verdict_reason: The verse is doctrinally narrow (the safety claim is specific to karma-yoga) and standardly misread (as 'every little thing helps'); the engineering layer treats it with the rigor required to preserve the narrow claim. Five commentaries with named traditions explicitly named in the source pack. The standard misreading is named and guarded against. The contrast structure (agriculture / medical / ritual vs karma-yoga) is preserved through the falsifiability and counter-example, both operationally specific to engineering practice.
